caption: A group of people dressed in traditional martial arts uniforms are performing a choreographed routine in a large, ornate room with chandeliers and carpeted floors. The central figure, wearing a white uniform, leads the group, holding a staff and demonstrating precise movements. The others, dressed in blue and black uniforms, follow his lead, mirroring his actions with synchronized gestures and stances. The participants appear focused and disciplined, moving fluidly as they practice their martial arts techniques. The audience seated around them watches attentively, adding to the formal atmosphere of the event.
